title: Shared genetic architecture of cortical morphology and psychiatric disorders: insights from cross-trait analyses across 180 cortical regions
summary: Cross-trait genetic analysis across 180 cortical regions and 6 psychiatric disorders. Key finding: NDD share fewer but more widespread-effect genetic loci with cortical morphology than internalizing disorders. Directional heterogeneity within pleiotropic loci limits predictive utility of brain morphology for psychiatric disorders.
